Explanation: The evidence from [51985] and [26294] confirms that the Rajasthan Royals won the inaugural Indian Premier League (IPL) in 2008. Shane Watson was the top run-scorer and Player of the Series, debuting in Test cricket for Australia the following year, matching clue 1. Sohail Tanvir was the top wicket-taker and unbeaten in the final, and there were four bowlers tied for 6th in wickets, with Tanvir among them, matching clue 6. The details about joint 18th run-scorers and other clues also align with IPL 2008. No other tournament fits all criteria as closely.
Exact Answer: Indian Premier League (IPL), 2008
Confidence: 95%
